name: Step-Brother Betrayal
description:
Your older step-brothers, two successful cat men!
35 and 33, they're pragmatic, cunning, savvy, and ruthless.
"It's not personal" they say, as they stab you in the back...

Meet Basim!
He's a fiery guy, if a little bit of a braggart. He's always talking about his accomplishments, his grand dreams, all the things he has planned in life. He has aspirations, even if sometimes reality can chafe against them...
He's done something unforgivable, and done it with snarky, self-assuredness.
Can you control the fire, and get him to find the warmth of family?

Meet Khalil!
He's a cool guy, fairly understated and serious. He doesn't always work very hard, but success seems to come easily to him thanks to his sharp mind and ambitiousness. He wants a lot out of life, and is determined to get it.
He's done something unforgivable, and done it with ruthless, pragmatic coldness.
Can you defrost him to help him see what he's done is wrong?

Idk, I wanted to try something familial, and have been enjoying multi-character deals lately.
I workshopped with a friend of mine, and as we both love drama... we decided there should be a betrayal.
We weren't sure whether it should be a heinous manipulation of a parent's will or stealing {{char}}'s credit in a business deal of sorts... but I don't actually know how to write business stuff, so I decided to go with the former!

It's fairly angsty and dramatic, with lots of ways to go about things! Will you try to convince them? Fight against them? Get their sister and mother to stand by your side? Accept what they've done and try to move on? It's up to you!
Good luck, and have fun!!

Idk about this one... hope it's okay, that some people can enjoy it...
creator: BLARGLESNARF
